from fastapi import Request


def get_settings(request: Request) -> dict:
    settings = {}
    settings["database_url"] = os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL", "sqlite:///db.sqlite")
    settings["redis_url"] = os.environ.get("REDIS_URL", "redis://localhost")
    settings["debug"] = os.environ.get("DEBUG", "false").lower() == "true"
    settings["log_level"] = os.environ.get("LOG_LEVEL", "INFO")
    settings["api_key"] = os.environ.get("API_KEY", "")
    settings["secret"] = os.environ.get("SECRET", "")
    return settings


@app.get("/users")
async def list_users(request: Request):
    settings = get_settings(request)
    db = connect(settings["database_url"])
    return db.query("SELECT * FROM users")
